description_long: This is a compact, modern shotgun with a tactical design, featuring a robust, angular frame and a matte dark gray finish. The body is constructed with a combination of metal and polymer, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The shotgun has a prominent full stock with a thick, reinforced butt, and a pistol grip for enhanced control. The top of the receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the barrel is relatively short, suggesting suitability for close-quarters use. The magazine appears to be detachable and is inserted in front of the trigger guard, which is squared and reinforced. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function and durability for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a matte dark gray finish, full stock, pistol grip, and a short barrel, designed for close-quarters use. Features include a Picatinny rail and a detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the full stock, pistol grip, short barrel, and Picatinny rail on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, narrow barrel profile, and the alignment of the Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, grip, and magazine, mirroring the features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the thick, reinforced buttstock and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short length, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized, reinforced with a solid frame
